description: A networking security lab that simulates ARP spoofing in Mininet, analyzes packet captures in Wireshark, and demonstrates enterprise mitigations using DHCP Snooping and Dynamic Arp Inspection in Cisco Packet Tracer.
name: arp-spoofing-mininet-lab

description: OS-enforced isolation demo for bounded local AI: an agent reaches a private vault only through the severino-vault-mcp sensitivity gate, with no filesystem bypass.
name: bounded-local-ai-demo

description: Generate a complete brand system from one color and a monogram: favicons, vector marks, wordmarks, social cards, brand sheets, and web tokens. The generated brand source behind jseverino.com.
name: branding-engine

description: CLI for managing Caddy reverse-proxy sites: add, remove, and list sites with automatic TLS snippet detection and config backup.
name: caddy-manager

description: Issues TLS certificates signed by a private root CA kept on an offline VM. The CA key never touches a networked machine.
name: cert-generator

description: Language-agnostic command-surface contract: declare a tool once, render every view from it, and carry each command's blast radius so agents can risk-gate before they act.
name: cordon

description: Opinionated repo scaffold with the cornerstones already wired: the Cordon contract, green-gating CI, and branch-to-PR-to-review governance.
name: cordon-starter

description: Object-oriented Python project that simulates American football games. Team objects track records while games generate realistic scores.
name: football-score-simulator

description: GitHub profile page
name: joeseverino

description: Public Astro portfolio on Cloudflare Pages, built from a private Obsidian vault: vault-to-content sync, CSP hardening, and a D1-backed contact form protected by Turnstile.
name: jseverino.com

description: Archived predecessor of jseverino.com — the WordPress→static mirror that proved Cloudflare Pages before the Astro rebuild.
name: jseverino.com-legacy

description: Interactive Python CLI math quiz with multiple difficulty levels, a scoring system, and retry logic.
name: math-quiz-game

description: A lightweight Zsh CLI helper that recursively checks PHP files for syntax errors while skipping dependency folders.
name: phptest

description: Command-line tool to track risks with auto-incrementing IDs.
name: risk-register

description: Joe Severino's brand kit: the brand as data, rendered by branding-engine.
name: severino-brand

description: Education-profile MCP server on the same engine: course notes, assignments, and a task ledger for a Georgia Tech vault. The engine's second consumer.
name: severino-edu-mcp

description: Tailscale-only Django ops app: a schema-validated docs index synced from an Obsidian vault, plus projects, assets, expenses, and an audit log. Gated CI/CD to a homelab.
name: severino-hq

description: Custom WordPress security layer: application hardening, file integrity monitoring, security event logging, and passkey-first login.
name: severino-labs-security-layer

description: WordPress block theme (full-site editing) for jseverino.com; its CSS design system was later carried into the site's non-WordPress rebuild.
name: severino-labs-theme

description: Obsidian plugin for the Severino Labs vault: a backlog cockpit, task capture, project launchers, and a site-accurate writeup preview.
name: severino-obsidian

description: Local-first MCP server that gives AI tools safe, sensitivity-gated access to a Git-backed Obsidian ops vault: runbooks, infrastructure inventories, and a task ledger, served over stdio from local files only.
name: severino-vault-mcp

description: Visual review for local and Cloudflare preview deploys. Compare DEV against LIVE with split, overlay/diff, synced navigation, response deltas, and SEO checks, plus a Pages addon and an MCP interface.
name: sitedrift

description: A quiz game that loads a JSON deck so you can quiz yourself and track progress, making sure every card comes up at least once before any repeats.
name: study-quiz

description: Automates Let's Encrypt wildcard certificate renewal and deployment to cPanel using Cloudflare DNS validation.
name: tls-cert-renewal-automation

description: Personal macOS CLI suite: age file crypt with Keychain-cached unlock, vault sync, dotfile backup, DNS latency diagnostics, and a one-command vault-to-docs bridge. One spec per tool renders its help, JSON, and TUI.
name: tools

description: Domain-agnostic vault-governance engine: schema profiles, indexing, ranked search, a task ledger, atomic writes, and a composable MCP core. The reusable core that powers severino-vault-mcp and severino-edu-mcp.
name: vault-engine

description: Zero-dependency Git deploy pipeline for solo devs. One command stages, commits, pushes, and deploys. No CI, no YAML, no dashboards.
name: zsh-git-deploy-workflow
